body.title: Build audit-precode skill — between /sprint plan and first edit
body.result: Created ~/.claude/skills/audit-precode/SKILL.md: 7 checks (file existence, symbol grep, HIGH-inertia reaffirmation, preferred-paths, test plan named, docstring plan, diff-size estimate). Model: Haiku.
body.description:
New skill audit-precode — invoked by /sprint after plan-review and before first edit. The cheapest place to catch hallucinated targets (P1 bug context). Checks: every file in the plan exists (path verification); every named symbol exists (grep verification); HIGH-inertia targets get explicit reaffirmation gate (not 'ticket said so'); plan doesn't introduce new memory types / SQLite / fallbacks (re-check design rules); plan doesn't propose any deprecated form from theigors/rules/preferred_paths; test file named; fixture path named; top-of-file docstring file named (load-bearing touches); diff size estimate vs ticket size — flag mismatch >2x.

Return AMEND when checks fail. Emits per-run record.

Model: Haiku, escalate to Sonnet when HIGH-inertia in plan.

**Affected files:** new ~/.claude/skills/audit-precode/SKILL.md, /sprint skill updated to invoke audit-precode after plan-review step.
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace telemetry. /sprint invocation is the integration point.
**Test plan:** seed a sprint plan that names a fictional file → audit-precode flags missing path. Plan that hits HIGH-inertia → reaffirmation gate fires. Plan with diff-size mismatch → AMEND. Telemetry recorded.
